Title: User Registration with Valid Data
Test Data:
- Email: test@example.com
- Password: StrongPassword123!
- Name: John Doe
- Nationality: USA
- Role: User
Test Steps:
1. Utente inputs registration data into the UI.
2. UI sends the registration data to FirebaseAuthentication.
3. FirebaseAuthentication validates the data and returns a token.
4. UI sends the user data along with the token to FirebaseAuthentication for saving.
5. FirebaseAuthentication confirms the user's save.
6. UI receives confirmation of successful registration.
Expected Result:
- User is successfully registered and logged in.
- Confirmation message is displayed on the UI.

Title: User Login with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: User is registered and logged out.
Test Steps:
1. Utente inputs valid credentials into the UI.
2. UI sends the credentials to FirebaseAuthentication.
3. FirebaseAuthentication validates the credentials and returns a token.
4. FirebaseAuthentication retrieves user data from the token.
5. UI receives valid credentials and user data.
Expected Result:
- User is successfully logged in.
- User data is retrieved and displayed on the UI.

Title: User Creates a Report with Valid Data
Test Data:
- Description: Broken street light
- Image: valid_image.jpg
- Coordinates: 40.7128, -74.0060
- Urgency: High
- Category: Public Safety
- Area: Downtown
Test Steps:
1. Utente inputs report details into the UI.
2. UI uploads the image to FirebaseStorage.
3. UI searches for the nearest competent entity based on coordinates and urgency.
4. UI saves the report with the image URL and entity data in FirebaseFirestore.
5. UI confirms the report saving.
Expected Result:
- Report is successfully created and saved.
- Confirmation message is displayed on the UI.

Title: User Receives Notification After Creating a Report
Preconditions: User is logged in and has created a report.
Test Data:
- Report ID: 12345
- Text: Your report has been submitted successfully.
- Date: 2023-10-01
Test Steps:
1. User creates a report.
2. UI generates a notification for the user.
3. Notification is saved in the database.
4. User receives the notification.
Expected Result:
- Notification is successfully generated and received by the user.
- Notification message is displayed on the UI.

Title: User Receives Multiple Notifications
Preconditions: User is logged in and has created multiple reports.

2. UI generates notifications for each report.
